title: Create: Maintenance Control
description: A Create addon introducing maintenance mechanics. Allows Train Stations to be temporarily disabled, making trains skip them without modifying any train schedules.
body:
# 🛠️ Create: Maintenance Control ⚠️ ![Modrinth](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ba69b03d-1f09-458c-9429-817854d7793a) Create: Maintenance Control is a small addon for Create that introduces maintenance mechanics to your train networks. ## 🛠️ Dependencies - This mod requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) - Using a recipe viewer such as [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) is recommended ## 🔎 Features ### Maintenance Box block The Maintenance Box block can be placed next to a Train Station block to mark it as being under maintenance.
Without Maintenance Boxes With Maintenance Boxes
When a station is under maintenance: - 🚫 Trains with that station in their schedules will automatically skip it. - 🚄 Depending on your railway network, trains may still pass through the station if no alternative route exists. However, when multiple paths are available, trains will prioritize the shortest route to the next station. - 🚉 Existing railway networks continue operating normally. - 🔧 Stations can be temporarily taken out of service without modifying train schedules. ## 🤝 Compatibility - The mod has been tested in a relatively large modpack containing many different Create addons, including Create: Aeronautics and Sable. No compatibility issues were encountered during testing. ## 📌 Planned - Ponder scene for the Maintenance Box block - Maintenance Box GUI - Expanded functionality for the Maintenance Box block
